ItacPersonItem.Notes: The engraving of Boschini`s portrait is taken from Pietro Bellotto`s drawing, and appears on La carta del navegar pitoresco. See Boschini`s biography by Michelangelo Muraro, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
